sourceNote: Full MCC callout drill from FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3. No memory items — procedural steps only. Single engine approach brief, configuration, final, missed approach brief and landing included.

flow.action: SINGLE ENGINE LANDING — BRIEF: failed engine confirmed L/R, planning single engine approach, minimum landing configuration confirmed, Vref [speed] bug set
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: BRIEF ACKNOWLEDGED — Vref single engine [speed] confirmed, FLAP setting [check], approach minima [check]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: CONFIRM SINGLE ENGINE CONFIGURATION — power L/R engine [setting], props [check], fuel [check], electrics [check]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: CONFIGURATION CONFIRMED — power [setting], airspeed [Vref], configuration [clean/flap setting], QRH SINGLE ENGINE LANDING checklist running
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: FINAL APPROACH — single engine, maintaining Vref, rudder trim confirmed, go-around power immediately available
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: FINAL CHECKLIST COMPLETE — gear [check], flaps [check], autofeather [check if applicable]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: GO-AROUND — single engine: advance power lever L/R engine, maintain Vyse, call for SINGLE ENGINE GO-AROUND checklist if required
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: TOUCHDOWN — maintaining directional control on landing roll, no reverse on live engine only
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: COMPLETING AFTER LANDING CHECKLIST — single engine configuration
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: SINGLE ENGINE LANDING — BRIEF: failed engine confirmed L/R, planning single engine approach, minimum landing configuration confirmed, Vref [speed] bug set
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: BRIEF ACKNOWLEDGED — Vref single engine [speed] confirmed, FLAP setting [check], approach minima [check]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: CONFIRM SINGLE ENGINE CONFIGURATION — power L/R engine [setting], props [check], fuel [check], electrics [check]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: CONFIGURATION CONFIRMED — power [setting], airspeed [Vref], configuration [clean/flap setting], QRH SINGLE ENGINE LANDING checklist running
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: FINAL APPROACH — single engine, maintaining Vref, rudder trim confirmed, go-around power immediately available
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts

flow.action: FINAL CHECKLIST COMPLETE — gear [check], flaps [check], autofeather [check if applicable]
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.3; MCC Callouts
